data.title: Publish with one click
data.summary: Editing is instant in the browser; publishing is an async GitHub Action.

data.title: Theming with tokens, not code
data.summary: Design tokens compile to CSS variables at runtime — restyle with no rebuild.

data.title: Hello from a repo-backed CMS
data.summary: Why the repo is the database, and what that buys you.

data.title: A CMS that lives in your repo
data.description: Build a real website on GitHub, edit it in place, and publish with one click — nothing centralized to maintain.

data.title: Un CMS qui vit dans votre dépôt
data.description: Construisez un vrai site sur GitHub, modifiez-le sur place, et publiez en un clic.
